name: EM:P Meowmine
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｅ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>イー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｍ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エム</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>：<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｐ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ピー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>グレニャード
desc: If a Link Monster is on the field or in either GY, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can only Special Summon "EM:P Meowmine" once per turn this way. If a Link-2 monster you control is sent to the GY or banished face-up (except during the Damage Step): You can banish this card from your GY (if it was there when the monster was sent or banished) or hand (even if not), then target 1 card your opponent controls; return it to the hand. You can only use this effect of "EM:P Meowmine" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If a Link Monster is on the field or in either GY, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can only Special Summon "EM:P Meowmine" once per turn this way. You can only use this effect of "EM:P Meowmine" once per turn.

jp_sets.set: Tactical-Try Deck: Evil★Twin the Kaito Pair

action: Activates if other cards are sent to the Graveyard
Activates if other cards are banished
Returns from your opponent's field to your opponent's hand
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summon by its own condition once per turn
banished: Banishes itself from hand for cost
Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
